starterTools.name: search_gmail_messages
starterTools.description: Search Gmail messages using a query string.

inputSchema.name: q
inputSchema.description: Gmail search query, e.g. from:alice@example.com is:unread

inputSchema.name: maxResults
inputSchema.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default 10)

starterTools.name: get_gmail_message
starterTools.description: Retrieve a Gmail message by its ID.

inputSchema.name: format
inputSchema.description: Response format: full, metadata, or minimal

starterTools.name: list_gmail_labels
starterTools.description: List all labels (folders) in the Gmail account.
